name: Barbecue Crab Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cheddar cheese, diced into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the crab meat, tomato sauce, and green stuffed olives.
2. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to blend.
3. Spread mixture on half of each English muffin.
4. Place a slice of cheddar cheese on top of each spread.
5. Broil until cheese is melted and hot.
6. Serve immediately.
